title: Fem Nu-Ar
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:FemNuAr.jpg]] |name=Fem Nu-Ar |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blonde]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, sister, sometimes I do ''amaze'' even myself!"
"So do I, Solo. So do I.|Han Solo and Fem Nu-Ar|}} '''Fem Nu-Ar''' was an [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] who worked alongside [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Ualp Xathan]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Nu-Ar and Xathan were pressed into service by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Drezzel]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], who tasked them with studying the ruins of an ancient [[Human/Legends|Human]] civilization on [[Seoul 5]]. Nu-Ar and Xathan uncovered a large cache of powerful [[Seoularian crystal]]s within the city, leading to their imprisonment as the Empire seized the crystals for itself for weapons development. The two archaeologists were freed by treasure seeker [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who activated the [[crystal control room]] and caused a massive explosion that destroyed the archaeological site and the Imperial forces—Nu-Ar and Xathan escaped along with the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] on his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'', where a grateful Nu-Ar gave Solo a kiss. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 84}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nu-Ar, Fem}} [[Category:Archaeologists of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]]
